name: Canon Guardian
description: Selective bootstrap re-injection on model switch, new session, gateway restart, and periodic turn intervals. Complements continuation-skip without per-turn token cost.

canonFiles.description: Workspace-relative paths to inject (e.g. AGENTS.md, OPERATING_RULES.md).

injectionInterval.description: Re-inject every N turns to defend against drift. Default 50.

restartIdleMs.description: Treat session as restarted if last injection was longer ago than this. Default 6h.

logInjections.description: Log each re-injection reason. Default true.
